notes: Stage 2: VMess config-level support (vmess:// links in Clash/sing-box/raw/base64 — Workers can't run VMess crypto, so config-only, like BPB). Telegram-driven Cloudflare auto-deploy: /install in the bot creates D1, uploads the worker, sets UUID+PASSWORD secrets, binds D1, enables workers.dev — CF API token used in-memory only, never stored. Builds on v3.2.0 (chart, user limits, routing catalog, 1101 fix).
